column2: The option is the gold answer for the item and represents the intended phenomenon measured by the task family.
The option is a distractor used to test whether the model confuses the target phenomenon with another reading.
A close but non-target reading that expresses another nearby indirect institutional meaning or pragmatic force.
A face-value, genuine, or sincerely positive reading of the statement rather than the benchmark target.
A routine, administrative, procedural, or technical reading that avoids the intended indirect pragmatic force.
A reading that overstates the statement into a more direct, immediate, punitive, or otherwise stronger meaning than the target.
